temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with a beard and a watch on his left wrist is shown in a dark, blue-lit room. His face is mostly obscured by shadow, but his eye is visible, reflecting a faint light. He mutters a single word. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense, mysterious atmosphere, introducing a character who is being interrogated or is in a state of distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Subdued, uncertain. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous ambient tone.)
(00:02-00:05) The scene cuts to a wider view of a dimly lit interrogation room. Two men, one in a blue shirt and another in a white shirt, are seated at a table with their backs to the camera. Across from them, a man in a suit sits behind a desk with a briefcase. A guard in a plaid shirt and blue pants enters the room through a doorway in the background. (Storyline: The setting is confirmed to be an interrogation room. The arrival of a guard signals that the questioning is about to begin or has just concluded.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, reportorial. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of a door closing.)
